info.title: Motorzad API Documentation
info.description: API Documentation for Motorzad Car Auctions Platform.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of available auctions (live and scheduled by default). Requires Bearer Token.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by status (e.g. live, scheduled, ended)

data.title: تويوتا كامري 2022
data.description: سيارة بحالة ممتازة وخالية من الصدمات...

get.description: Returns the full details of a specific auction. Optionally uses Bearer Token to return user-specific context (is_watching, user_highest_bid).

data.title: تويوتا كامري 2022
data.description: سيارة بحالة ممتازة وخالية من الصدمات...

example.message: Please complete identity verification to view auctions.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of active bids for a specific auction. Requires Bearer Token.

example.message: Please complete identity verification to view auctions.

post.description: Adds or removes the specified auction from the user's watchlist.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of auctions that the user has added to their watchlist.

data.title: تويوتا كامري 2022
data.description: سيارة بحالة ممتازة وخالية من الصدمات...

get.description: Returns a paginated list of auctions created by the current user.

data.title: تويوتا كامري 2022
data.description: سيارة بحالة ممتازة وخالية من الصدمات...

post.description: Place a new bid or proxy bid on a live auction.

example.message: Your bid has been placed successfully!

422.description: Validation error or business logic failure

example.message: Your bid must be at least 55000.
You have been blocked from participating in this auction.

put.description: Modify an active bid amount or auto-bid settings.

example.message: You can only update an active bid.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of auctions the current user bid on, with bidder status and stats.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by bidder status: winning, outbid, won, lost

get.description: Returns a paginated list of auctions that the current user has won, with payment status filtering and bank accounts for transfer.

parameters.name: payment_status
parameters.description: Filter by payment status: pending, paid

post.description: Registers a new customer and sends an OTP to their email.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: The language of the response (ar, en)

message.example: Registration successful. Please complete your profile.

example.message: The email has already been taken.

email: The email has already been taken.

post.description: Authenticates a user and returns an access token.
Revokes the user's current access token.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's profile information.

put.description: Updates the authenticated user's profile details.

422.description: Validation error or incorrect old password

post.description: Uploads a new profile photo for the authenticated user.
Sends an OTP to the user's email to reset their password.

message.example: Password reset OTP sent to your email.

post.description: Verifies the OTP and sets a new password.

message.example: Password reset successfully. You can now login.

post.description: Verifies the authenticated user's email using the 6-digit OTP code sent during registration.
Regenerates and resends the 6-digit OTP verification code to the authenticated user's email.

message.example: Verification OTP sent to your email.

post.description: Enables or disables auto bidding for the user's account.

get.description: Returns platform settings like terms, about us, etc.
Returns a list of active Frequently Asked Questions.

data.question_en: How can I register for the auction?
data.answer_ar: يمكنك التسجيل عبر الضغط على زر إنشاء حساب وتعبئة بياناتك...
data.answer_en: You can register by clicking the sign-up button and filling in your details...

data.answer_ar: نحن نقبل التحويل البنكي والبطاقات الائتمانية...
data.answer_en: We accept bank transfers and credit cards...

get.description: Returns a list of active Vehicle Makes, Models, and standard Colors for dropdowns.
Returns a list of featured live auctions for the mobile app home screen.

data.title: تويوتا كامري 2022
data.description: سيارة بحالة ممتازة وخالية من الصدمات...

get.description: Returns categorized search results for auctions, pages, and FAQs.

items.question: كيف يمكنني المشاركة في المزاد؟
items.answer: يمكنك المشاركة من خلال التسجيل ودفع العربون المطلوب.

get.description: Returns the identity verification status of the currently authenticated user.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: The language of the response (ar, en)

post.description: Allows the authenticated user to upload national ID and selfie images to request identity verification.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: The language of the response (ar, en)

id_image.description: Identity document image (JPEG, PNG, JPG, max 2MB)

selfie_image.description: Selfie holding document (JPEG, PNG, JPG, max 2MB)

message.example: You already have a pending verification request.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of all past KYC verification requests submitted by the authenticated user.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: The language of the response (ar, en)

get.description: Returns a paginated list of orders (auctions won by the authenticated user).
Returns the details of a specific order (won auction), including deposit, commission, and total amounts.

put.description: Submit checkout details (delivery and payment method) for a won auction order.

example.message: Checkout details updated successfully. Pending admin confirmation.

post.description: Generates a 6-digit OTP and sends it via phone or email. In local or debug mode, the code is returned in the response for easy testing.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: The language of the response (ar, en)

post.description: Verifies the OTP code. If correct and user exists, authenticates them. If they do not exist, automatically registers them as a bidder and returns access token.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: The language of the response (ar, en)

get.description: Returns a paginated list of support tickets for the authenticated user.

data.subject: I have an issue with my deposit

post.description: Creates a new support ticket and its first message.

subject.example: I have an issue with my deposit

message.example: Please help, my deposit is not showing.

data.subject: I have an issue with my deposit

messages.message: Please help, my deposit is not showing.

get.description: Returns details of a specific ticket along with its chat messages.

data.subject: I have an issue with my deposit

messages.message: Please help, my deposit is not showing.

post.description: Sends a new message in an existing ticket chat.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's wallet balance, total deposits, total withdrawals, and debt ceiling information.
Returns a paginated list of wallet transactions for the authenticated user.

post.description: Submits a request to withdraw funds from the wallet.

example.message: Withdrawal request submitted successfully. It will be reviewed soon.
Insufficient available balance for this withdrawal. Some of your funds may be frozen in active bids.

post.description: Submits a deposit request by uploading a bank transfer receipt.

example.message: Deposit request submitted successfully. It will be reviewed soon.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of deposit requests for the authenticated user.
Returns a paginated list of withdrawal requests for the authenticated user.
Returns a list of active platform bank accounts that users can transfer deposits to.
